positive: Minimalist geometric forest animals silhouette art, featuring playful fox and bear leaping through stylized stylized autumn leaves. The scene uses only solid black silhouettes against a pure white background, creating strong negative space and high contrast. The style is clean, modern, and highly graphic, reminiscent of mid-century modern folk art. The composition is centered, balanced, and suitable for repetition or single-placement print on apparel. Lighting is flat and conceptual, emphasizing the clean edge definition of the silhouettes. Color palette is limited to black and negative white.
negative: blurry, realistic photography, low contrast, watercolor, gradient, noise, text, signature, watermark, logos, copyright, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts
